name: tng-blog-backend
description: Backend TypeScript do TNG Blog — sidecar do TNG Demand Hub. Migração do Python original.

scripts.build:mac: bun build --compile --minify --external sharp --external '@img/*' --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/main.ts --outfile tng-blog-sidecar-aarch64-apple-darwin && bun run vendor:sharp
scripts.build:mac-x64: bun build --compile --minify --external sharp --external '@img/*' --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/main.ts --outfile tng-blog-sidecar-x86_64-apple-darwin && bun run vendor:sharp
scripts.build:win: bun build --compile --minify --external sharp --external '@img/*' --target=bun-windows-x64 src/main.ts --outfile tng-blog-sidecar-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe && bun run vendor:sharp
